avoid: never name a real person (roles only)

delivery-only: no dine-in/restaurant/cart scenes — the food arrives
no gym/workout framing (this is a food brand)

positioning: Authentic Saudi home-cooked meals delivered with quality and care.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the use of traditional ingredients and recipes to emphasize authenticity and quality.
Share stories or testimonials from satisfied customers about the taste and quality of the food.
Create content around the convenience of home delivery, focusing on how it brings comfort and warmth to the home.
Showcase the packaging process to ensure customers of the quality and freshness upon delivery.
Focus on the emotional connection and nostalgia of enjoying traditional Saudi meals with family.
research_requests: Investigate customer demographics to better understand age and price sensitivity.
Explore potential partnerships or collaborations with influencers who align with the brand's cultural values.
Research competitor strategies in the Saudi home delivery market to identify unique positioning opportunities.
